description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner with a rectangular shape, supported by a slim metal frame. The lower portion of the banner is covered in a blue patterned panel featuring a herringbone design and the text 'Qseg' in white, while the upper section is a translucent or white panel. The frame consists of thin metallic rods, with stabilizing feet extending perpendicularly at the base for balance. The banner is designed to be lightweight and portable, suitable for temporary placement in public or commercial spaces. The overall appearance is modern and professional, with a clean, minimalistic aesthetic. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for indoor or sheltered outdoor use.
description: A modern freestanding vertical banner with a blue patterned lower panel, white upper section, and slim metal frame. Features the 'Qseg' logo and a herringbone design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue herringbone-patterned panel with 'Qseg' logo and the white upper section.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the metal frame and the perpendicular stabilizing feet.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blue patterned panel and white upper section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and stabilizing feet.
